QueryFileSystem.userId: User ID of the file system owner to query
QueryFileSystem.fsId: File system ID(s) to query; supports batch query as fsId=fsIdA,fsIdB,fsIdC, max 100
QueryFileSystem.marker: Start position for paginated listing, a system-generated string
QueryFileSystem.maxKeys: Maximum number of results per page, up to 1000; default is 1000
QueryFileSystem.filterTag: Filter by tag in {key}:{value} format; use {key}:@@@ to match all values under a key
